hero.headline: ለሙሉ ሰንሰለቱ የሚሰራ የመከታተያ ስርዓት።
hero.subheadline: Tracebud የ EUDR ተገዥነትን ቀላል፣ በራስ ለራስ የሚሰራ እና ዋጋው የሚደርስ መሳሪያ በመስጠት ገበሬዎች፣ ማህበራት፣ ላኪዎች እና ገዢዎች የምንጭ ውሂብን ሰብስበው፣ አጋርተው እና እንደገና እንዲጠቀሙ ይረዳል፣ ሰነድ ለመከታተል ሳይደክሙ።
hero.subheadlineSecondary: Capture data once, control how it is shared, preserve provenance through the chain, and generate reusable EUDR-ready compliance records.
hero.supportingText: ለአቅራቢዎች ነፃ። ለውስን ግንኙነት እና ለቀላል ሂደቶች የተነደፈ። ኮንሰልታንቶች አያስፈልጉም።

whyTracebudSection.headline: ተገዥነት ታማኝ እንዲሆን ውስብስብ መሆን የለበትም።
whyTracebudSection.description: አብዛኞቹ የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቶች ሰዎች አልሞክሩም ብለው አይወድቁም። ሂደቱ በጣም በእጅ ስለሚሰራ፣ በጣም ውድ ስለሆነ እና በጣም ተበታትኖ ስለሆነ ይወድቃሉ። Tracebud ድጋጌ ማለትን ያስወግዳል፣ ስለዚህ መረቡ ትልቅ፣ ተበታትኖ ወይም አልተደገፈም ቢሆንም ሁሉም መሳተፍ ይችላሉ።

simple.title: ቀላል
simple.description: አንድ መድረክ። አንድ የሥራ ፍሰት። አንድ የእውነት ምንጭ።

automated.title: በራስ የሚሰራ
automated.description: ጥያቄዎች በራስ-ሰር በመረቡ ውስጥ ይንቀሳቀሳሉ፣ ስለዚህ ማስረጃው ፈጥኖ ምንጭ ይደርሳል።

inclusive.title: አካታች
inclusive.description: ገበሬዎች የዲጂታል መዳረሻ ውስን ቢሆንም፣ መሳሪያ ተጋር ቢጠቀሙም ወይም ምልክት ያልተረጋጋ ቢሆንም በቀጥታ መሳተፍ ይችላሉ።

howItWorksSection.headline: ከመጀመሪያው ጥያቄ እስከ እንደገና ሊጠቀም የሚችል ማስረጃ።
howItWorksSection.subtitle: አራት ደረጃዎች። ያለ ውስብስብነት።

step1.title: መረብዎን ያክሉ
step1.description: አንድ ኮንታክት ወይም 500። CSV ይስቀሉ ወይም በእጅ ያክሉ።

step2.title: አንድ ጥያቄ ይላኩ
step2.description: በራስ-ሰር በሰንሰለቱ ውስጥ ይፈስሳል። ሰው ለመከታተል የለም።

step3.title: የመነሻ ውሂብ ይሰብስቡ
step3.description: አንድ ጊዜ ይመዝገቡት፣ ከዚያም ለብዙ ጭነቶች እና ገዢዎች እንደገና ይጠቀሙበት።

step4.title: ሁሉንም አስተካክሉ
step4.description: በጋራ ዲጂታል የሥራ ፍሰት ሁሉንም በአንድ መስመር ላይ ያቆዩ።

productsSection.title: የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለቶች በእውነት እንዴት እንደሚሰሩ ተነድፎ የተሰራ
productsSection.intro: Built for how fragmented supply chains actually work.

mobileApp.label: የሞባይል መተግበር
mobileApp.headline: ለመሬት ስራ፣ ለቢሮ አይደለም።
mobileApp.description: ገበሬዎች የመሬት ድንበር ሊያስመልክቱ፣ መረጃ ሊጋሩ እና በቀላል የሞባይል ተሞክሮ ምላሽ ሊሰጡ ይችላሉ። ኦፍላይን ይሰራል፣ ግልጽ እይታዎችን ይጠቀማል እና ሂደቱን ቀላል ያደርጋል።

features.gps: የጂፒኤስ ብዙሕ ሐንድ ለመያዝ ወሰን ይመላለሱ

mobileApp.supportingText: ለአቅራቢዎች ነፃ። ከባድ ማዘጋጃ ወይም ረጅም ስልጠና የለም።

dashboard.label: ዳሽቦርድ
dashboard.headline: መረብዎን ያለ ድግግሞሽ ያስተዳድሩ።
dashboard.description: ኮንታክቶችን በብዛት ይጫኑ፣ አንድ ጥያቄ ይላኩ እና የሥራ ፍሰቱ በሙሉ ሰንሰለቱ ውስጥ እንዲፈስስ ያድርጉ። ምላሾችን ይከታተሉ፣ የተረጋገጡ ውሂቦችን እንደገና ይጠቀሙ እና እያንዳንዱን ጭነት በትንሽ የእጅ ስራ ያስቀጥሉ።

features.bulkRequest: ለብዙ መቶ ኮንታክቶች በአንድ ጊዜ ጥያቄ ላክ
features.cascade: ጥያቄዎች በመረቡ ውስጥ እስከ ምንጭ ይወርዳሉ

dashboard.supportingText: ያነሰ መከታተል። ያነሱ ክፍተቶች። ፈጣን ማስተላለፊያ።

customersSection.headline: ደንበኞች Tracebud ለምን ይጠቀማሉ
customersSection.description: ያነሰ የእጅ ተከታተል። በአጠቃላይነት አበላሽነትን ይጠብቁ። በሙሉ መተማመን ይላኩ።

gaps.title: ያነሱ የማስረጃ ክፍተቶች
gaps.description: መቀላቀል፣ የማስረጃ ጥያቄዎች፣ የድርባይ ማጣራት፣ የወረድ መከታተያ እና DDS ዝግጅት በአንድ የተገናኘ ስርዓት ውስጥ።

provenance.title: አበላሽነት የተጠበቀ
provenance.description: የተገዥነት ማስረጃ ከእውነተኛ አቅራቢ፣ ቦታ፣ ቦታ ድርባይ እና የመላኪያ መዝገቦች ጋር የተያያዘ። የተለዩ ፋይሎች አይደሉም።

handoff.title: ፈጣን ማስተላለፊያ
handoff.description: በትክክል ሊላክ የሚችለውን በተጨማሪ እምነት። መላኪያዎች ሲንቀሳቀሱ የጎደሉ ውሂብ ለመከታተል ያነሰ ጊዜ።

inclusionSection.headline: ተገዥነት ትንንሽ ገበሬዎችን ወደ ኋላ መተው የለበትም።
inclusionSection.description: ትልቅ ኩባንያዎች ውስብስብ ስርዓቶችን ሊገዙ ይችላሉ። ትንንሽ ገበሬዎች መሳሪያዎቹ በጣም ውድ፣ በጣም ቴክኒካል ወይም በጣም ዝግ ስለሆኑ መውጣት የለባቸውም። Tracebud ሁሉንም አባል ታይቶ፣ ተገናኝቶ እና ለገበያ ዝግጁ ያደርጋል።
inclusionSection.punchline: እኛ ለብዙ ዓመታት ትንንሽ ገበሬዎችን ውጭ ያቆዩትን የመዳረሻ መከላከያዎች እናስወግዳለን።

finalCtaSection.headline: Make compliance usable for the whole chain.
finalCtaSection.description: Start with the network you already have, and give every actor a way to participate — without turning the process into paperwork theater.

pricingSection.label: Pricing
pricingSection.headline: Simple monthly pricing by network size.

hero.title: Join the Tracebud Pilot
hero.description: We are inviting a small group of producers, cooperatives, exporters, and importers to test our traceability tools and help us build a fully EUDR-ready supply chain — together.

items.free: Free for the duration of the pilot — no billing until you go live.
items.mapping: Free mapping of farmers and fields during the pilot.
items.literacy: Built for low digital literacy and self-serve onboarding.
items.pricing: Lifelong preferential pricing for active early partners.
items.trust: Designed for traceability, consent, and EU data residency.

whoShouldApply.title: Who should apply
whoShouldApply.description: We want a balanced group across the chain.
whoShouldApply.footnote: If you can involve more than one role in the same chain, your application is especially valuable.

items.feedback: Feedback sessions to improve the product fast.

items.activeUse: Use the product actively during the pilot.
items.productImproving: Accept that the product is still being improved.
items.reviewCall: Join at least one short review call or provide written feedback.

whyJoin.title: Why join
whyJoin.description: This pilot is not just a trial. It is a chance to shape a product built for real supply chains, while getting early access, lower risk, and better commercial terms later. Pilot projects work best when both sides are clear about scope, timing, and expectations.

trust.title: Trust and compliance
trust.description: Tracebud is built with EU data residency, consent-based access, audit logs, and immutable compliance packages for shipments.

mobileCta.footnote: No financial obligation. Open until 30 September 2026.

form.farmerImageAlt: Farmer using Tracebud in the field
form.title: Apply to join the pilot
form.subtitle: No financial obligation. We will follow up within 5 business days.
form.success: Application received. We will follow up by email.

fields.successCriteria: Short note on why you want to join

placeholders.successCriteria: What you hope to get out of the pilot.

eudrReadiness.not_started: Not started — need a clear path
eudrReadiness.in_progress: In progress — partial tools or data
eudrReadiness.advanced: Advanced — systems in place, tuning for EUDR

startWindows.flexible: Flexible — fit matters more than date

errors.roleRequired: Please select your role in the chain.
errors.noteRequired: Please add a short note on why you want to join.

thankYou.title: You're on the list
thankYou.description: Thank you for your interest in Tracebud. We review every submission personally.
thankYou.savedWithoutEmail: We saved your request for {email}. Our team will follow up by email.

timeline.submittedDescription: We have your details and will review your role in the supply chain.
timeline.followUpDescription: We will email you with next steps when Tracebud is available for your use case.
timeline.accessDescription: Waitlist members get first access as we open new regions and commodities.

thankYou.shareDescription: Know a cooperative, exporter, or importer who needs traceability? Send them to Tracebud.

exitIntentModal.headline: Start building traceability for your network.
exitIntentModal.description: Join the waitlist to get early access when Tracebud opens for your region and commodity.

waitlistDialog.headline: Join the waitlist
waitlistDialog.description: Tell us about your network and we'll reach out when Tracebud is ready for you.
waitlistDialog.note: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe at any time.

sidePanel.tagline: Traceability infrastructure for the whole chain.
sidePanel.subline: Built for every actor — from field to export desk.

success.title: You're on the list
success.description: We review every submission personally and will follow up by email.

form.producerRange: How many producers need EUDR compliance?

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.producerRangeRequired: Please select the number of producers.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

marketing.earlyAdopters: Join the waitlist for early access

hero.subheadline: የ EU ገበያ ተደራሽነት ቀላል ተደርጓል። ከምርት ሰሪ እስከ ትርጓሚ ድረስ ሙሉ የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለት ምንዝር አይام ውስጥ።
hero.trialInfo: 30 ቀናት ነጻ። ምንም ካሬዲት ካርድ አይቀтребуется።

footer.tagline: ቀላል የEUDR ሂደቶች። ጠንካራ የገበያ መዳረሻ።
footer.waitlistPrompt: ወደ የመጠባበቂያ ዝርዝር ለመቀላቀል ዝግጁ ነዎት?
footer.waitlistSubline: Tracebud ለአውታረ መረብዎ ሲከፈት በመጀመሪያ ይወቁ።

impact.title: ትሬበድ ለምን ይሰራል
impact.subtitle: ለሚወሰን ገበያ ላይ የአቅርቦት ሰንሰለት ግልጽነት ለመስጠት ከስሪት ተፈጥሮ ተሰርቷል። ለመጠቀም ቀላል፣ ለመስፋት የተገነባ።

farmer.title: አርሶ አደር ሙሌት
farmer.description: ስማርት ፎን መተግበሪያ በሜዳ ላይ የተገናኘ ሳይሆን ይሰራል

tracing.title: ብክ-ጊዜ ምንዝር
tracing.description: GPS፣ ፎቶዎች፣ ጊዜ ምልክቶች፣ ሊቀየር የማይችሉ ሰነዶች

global.title: ዓለም ሁሉ ዋቅ
global.description: TRACES NT ግንኙነት እና ብዙ ቋንቋ ድጋፍ

impact.useCases: ቀደምት ሙከራዎች ቁጥር በቁጥር Tracebud ለሚከተለውን ይጠቀማሉ:

compliance.title: ደንብ ማክበር
compliance.subtitle: ለ EU ደንብ ያስፈልጋሚ ለማሟላት ዋና ስርዓት ግንኙነት ነው ከስሪት ተሰርቷል።

faq.title: Questions? We have answers.
faq.whenLaunch: When can I start using Tracebud?
faq.whenLaunchAnswer: Tracebud is opening in phases by region and commodity. Join the waitlist and we will email you when your use case is supported.
faq.whoCommoditiesAnswer: ቡና፣ ካካዩ፣ የእንጆሪ ዘይት፣ ረብ፣ ማሞ፣ እንሰሳት እና እንጨት ዋና ዋና EUDR ሸቀቆች ናቸው። ፍላጎቱ ላይ ተመስርቶ እናዝናውለሙ።
faq.howCostAnswer: Free for producers. Cooperatives, exporters, and buyers pay based on network size and usage. Visit the pricing page or join the waitlist for details.
faq.howLongAnswer: Producers can start mapping with the offline app right away. Most cooperatives upload their network and send the first request within a week.
faq.supportAnswer: Every waitlist member gets a personal follow-up by email. Once onboarded, you have direct access to our team for setup and compliance questions.
faq.whyCommoditiesAnswer: Coffee first, then the other six EUDR commodities: cocoa, palm oil, rubber, soy, cattle, and timber. See our pricing page for the full roadmap.
